ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "gene_version" TEXT /* Version of the gene annotation */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene's function */,
  "gene_ontologies" TEXT /* Gene Ontology (GO) terms associated with the gene */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the gene belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the gene record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epigenetic_marks" (
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epigenetic mark */,
  "mark_name" TEXT /* Name of the epigenetic mark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the epigenetic mark */,
  "mark_type" TEXT /* Type of epigenetic mark (e.g., histone modification, DNA methylation) */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* Biological process associated with the mark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mark record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the mark record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_mark_data" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epigenetic mark */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the epigenetic mark for the gene */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ChIP-seq, RNA-seq) */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id", "mark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chip_seq_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ChIP-seq data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epigenetic mark */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Position of the peak */,
  "peak_value" REAL /* Value of the peak */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the data was collected from */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied to the cells */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chip_seq_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chip_seq_data_mark_id FOREIGN KEY ("mark_id") REFERENCES epigenetic_marks ("mark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rna_seq_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RNA-seq data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the data was collected from */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied to the cells */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rna_seq_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microarray_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microarray data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the data was collected from */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied to the cells */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microarray_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_gene_mark_data" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "mark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epigenetic mark */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the epigenetic mark for the gene in the project */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ChIP-seq, RNA-seq) */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "gene_id", "mark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_chip_seq_data" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ChIP-seq data */,
  "peak_position" INTEGER /* Position of the peak */,
  "peak_value" REAL /* Value of the peak */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the data was collected from */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied to the cells */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_rna_seq_data" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RNA-seq data */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the data was collected from */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied to the cells */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_microarray_data" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microarray data */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell the data was collected from */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments applied to the cells */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the experiment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
